chunks.text: I went to the town library to borrow a book about mountains.
It was a very quiet place.
At the desk, there was a kind man.
” I asked in a small voice.
“ Yes, you may,” he said with a smile.
In the library, you may not speak loud, because everyone is reading quietly.
When I went outside, the sky was a little cloudy.
“ It may rain this evening,” I thought.
I will read this book at home, and I will return it soon.
